zh.Blackrod, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾布拉可洛德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel English於大約1351年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德時，她的父親William English42歲，母親Margaret le Brun35歲。她於1369年8月1日之前與Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1397年在英國藍卡爾法爾頓享年47歲。

zh-hans.Blackrod, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾布拉可洛德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel English于大约1351年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德时，她的父亲William English42岁，母亲Margaret le Brun35岁。她于1369年8月1日之前与Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1397年在英国藍卡爾法爾頓享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: English
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Welsh: ethnic name from Middle English English, Inglish, Inglis ‘English’ (Old English Englisc), sometimes alternating with Anglo-Norman French Engleis, Engles, Anglais, Angles (Old French Englois). Compare Inglis and England . Among the aristocracy and upper gentry it marked out a man of English ancestry from one of Norman or continental origin. In counties bordering England with Scotland and Wales the name distinguished an Englishman from a Scot or a native Welshman on both sides of the border. The name may also have been acquired by English merchants who traded abroad or who lived and worked in a ‘French’ borough in England (one exclusively administered by Normans).
Irish: in Ireland, this name was used to denote an Englishman, often being adopted for Irish Aingléis ‘Englishman’ or through mistranslation for Mac an Ghallóglaigh, see Gallogly and Golightly .

variants.name: Engles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Michel, Remi.
English and Scottish: variant of   English   or   Inglis  .
Altered form of German and Dutch   Engels  .

variants.name: Inglis
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Midlothian): ethnic name from Scots Inglis ‘English(man)’. Compare English .

variants.name: England
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel English was born about 1351, in Westmorland, England, her father, William English, was 42 and her mother, Margaret le Brun, was 35. She married Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton before 1 August 1369, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1397, in Farleton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel English est née environ 1351, à Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, William English, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret le Brun, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton avant 1 août 1369, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1397, à Farleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel English um 1351 in Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William English 42 und ihre Mutter Margaret le Brun 35. Sie hat vor 1. August 1369 in Lancashire, England Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1397 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Farleton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel English è nata il circa 1351 nel Westmorland, England, sua padre, William English, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Margaret le Brun, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton prima del 1 agosto 1369, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1397, nel Farleton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Englishが約1351年にイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父William Englishは42歳，母Margaret le Brunは35歳であった。1369年8月1日以前にイギリスランカシュアイアでSir Nicholas Harington of Farletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1397年にイギリスランカシュアイアファルレトンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel English(이)가 대략 1351년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William English(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret le Brun(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1369년 8월 1일 이전 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1397년 영국 랭카실르 패를레턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel English nasceu aproximadamente 1351, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William English, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret le Brun, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton antes 1 de agosto de 1369, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1397, em Farleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel English родилась около 1351 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William English было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret le Brun, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton перед 1 августа 1369 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1397 г. в местности фарлетон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel English nació aproximadamente 1351, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, William English, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret le Brun, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton antes de 1 de agosto de 1369, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1397, en Farleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
